scripts.build: node scripts/generate-roundtable-viz-data.cjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/prepare-static-routes.cjs
scripts.test:auth: tsc --ignoreConfig --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --rootDir src --outDir .plugin-staging/auth-tests --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/features/account/auth-port.ts src/infrastructure/cloudbase/auth/config-core.ts src/infrastructure/cloudbase/auth/auth-adapter-core.ts && node --test server/infrastructure/cloudbase/auth/*.test.cjs
